user_prompt: Customer is leaving for a competitor. Draft a polite acknowledgment with one optional check-in question, no aggressive retention.
actual_output:
Priority: LOW
Category: Billing/Account - Cancellation

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for letting us know. I've gone ahead and updated your account to reflect your cancellation. 

We're sorry to see you go, but we completely understand that different teams have different needs, and we want you to use the tool that works best for you. If you have a brief moment, we'd love to hear what made the other platform a better fit for your workflow—any feedback you can share really helps us improve OpenClaw. 

Wishing you and your team all the best! Please feel free to reach out if you ever need us again in the future.

Best,
Compass
OpenClaw Support
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a customer support response drafting exercise and provided a professional, empathetic draft that followed all the user's constraints.
